zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan於大約1270年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，她的父親Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan31歲，母親Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan27歲。她於1291年與Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾洛哈結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1366年在蘇格蘭享年97歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan于大约1270年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，她的父亲Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan31岁，母亲Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan27岁。她于1291年与Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan在苏格兰音巴內-爾洛哈结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1366年在苏格兰享年97岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan was born about 1270, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan, was 31 and her mother, Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan, was 27. She married Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan in 1291, in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1366, in Scotland, at the age of 97, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan est née environ 1270, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan en 1291, à Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1366, à Écosse, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Battle of Neville's Cross, West of Durha: Neville's Cross, Durham, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan um 1270 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan 27. Sie hat 1291 in Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1366 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan è nata il circa 1270 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan nel 1291, nel Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1366, nel Scotland, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattanが約1270年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattanは31歳，母Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattanは27歳であった。1291年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアロチャバーでAngus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1366年にスコットランドで97歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan(이)가 대략 1270년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1291년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 럭압어에서 Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1366년 스컷랜드에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan em 1291, em Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1366, em Scotland, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ro.Battle of Neville's Cross, West of Durha: Neville's Cross, Durham, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan родилась около 1270 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan в 1291 г. в местности лочабир, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1366 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva NicDhùghall Heretrix of Chattan nació aproximadamente 1270, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Dougall Phaol, 6th Chief of Clan Chattan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. Dougal MacQillichattan, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Angus MacFerquhard Mackintosh 6th Chief Mackintosh, 7th Chief Chattan en 1291, en Lochaber, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1366, en Scotland, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
